panels.title: Change Impact: Cost
panels.description: Daily cost over time. Vertical markers show commits and config changes (claudit_annotations). Look for cost inflections after a marker — rising = new delegation or model change; falling = efficiency improvement.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Change Impact: Tokens
panels.description: Daily token volume (input, output, cache read, cache write) over time. A shift after a commit marker may indicate a CLAUDE.md change that grew or shrank context size.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Change Impact: Throughput
panels.description: Daily kanban cards reaching done. Compare against the Cost panel to see whether cost changes track with productivity changes after a commit marker.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Total Cost (Today)
panels.description: Total spend across all Claude Code sessions that started today. If this is climbing unexpectedly fast, check the Cost by Agent Type panel — a single Opus delegation or a runaway sidechain is usually the culprit.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) = date('now')
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) = date('now')

panels.title: Total Cost (All Time)
panels.description: Cumulative spend since metrics collection began. Use this as a baseline when estimating project budgets — compare against the Cost by Project panel to see which codebases consume the most.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics

panels.title: Cards Done (7d)
panels.description: Total cards completed (done events) in the last 7 days. Measures throughput velocity.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS done_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS done_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days')

panels.title: Cost Over Time
panels.description: Daily spend trend across all Claude Code sessions. Spikes usually indicate large Opus delegations or sessions with many turns — check the Cost by Agent Type panel to identify the driver.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cost per Card Completed (7-day rolling)
panels.description: Total cost / done cards, 7-day rolling window. Falling = changes are working; rising = quality or efficiency degrading.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH daily_cost AS (SELECT date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) AS day, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day), daily_done AS (SELECT date(recorded_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS dones FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', d.day) AS time, SUM(c.cost) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / NULLIF(SUM(d.dones) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0) AS cost_per_card FROM daily_done d LEFT JOIN daily_cost c ON c.day = d.day ORDER BY d.day ASC
targets.queryText: WITH daily_cost AS (SELECT date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) AS day, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day), daily_done AS (SELECT date(recorded_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS dones FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', d.day) AS time, SUM(c.cost) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / NULLIF(SUM(d.dones) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0) AS cost_per_card FROM daily_done d LEFT JOIN daily_cost c ON c.day = d.day ORDER BY d.day ASC

panels.title: Cost Over Time by Agent
panels.description: Daily cost broken out by top-5 agents by total cost in the visible period; remaining agents aggregated as "other".

targets.rawQueryText: WITH top5 AS (SELECT agent FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY SUM(cost_usd) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END AS agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics am WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)), CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: WITH top5 AS (SELECT agent FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY SUM(cost_usd) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END AS agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics am WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)), CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cost by Agent
panels.description: Period-over-prior-period cost delta per agent role. cost_period vs cost_prior shows whether an agent is trending up or down in spend. Filter by repo using the Repo variable above.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_period FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_prior FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime((2*$__from - $__to)/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT c.agent, c.cost_period, COALESCE(p.cost_prior, 0) AS cost_prior, CASE WHEN p.cost_prior IS NULL OR p.cost_prior = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((c.cost_period - p.cost_prior) / p.cost_prior) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM cur c LEFT JOIN prior p ON c.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS cost_period, p.cost_prior, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior p LEFT JOIN cur c ON p.agent = c.agent WHERE c.agent IS NULL ORDER BY cost_period DESC
targets.queryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_period FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_prior FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime((2*$__from - $__to)/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT c.agent, c.cost_period, COALESCE(p.cost_prior, 0) AS cost_prior, CASE WHEN p.cost_prior IS NULL OR p.cost_prior = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((c.cost_period - p.cost_prior) / p.cost_prior) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM cur c LEFT JOIN prior p ON c.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS cost_period, p.cost_prior, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior p LEFT JOIN cur c ON p.agent = c.agent WHERE c.agent IS NULL ORDER BY cost_period DESC

panels.title: Cost by Kanban Session
panels.description: Cumulative spend per kanban session name (e.g., swift-falcon). If one session dwarfs the rest, inspect which agents drove the cost.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT kanban_session, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT kanban_session, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Cost Efficiency Trend (cost per 1K tokens, with cache ratio)
panels.description: Effective cost per 1K tokens (cost_usd / total_tokens * 1000) and cache hit ratio overlaid. Cache improving means effective cost drops.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k_tokens, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k_tokens, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cards Completed Per Day
panels.description: Daily card completion velocity. A rising trend means more work is flowing through to done; gaps indicate days with no completions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Card Cycle Time
panels.description: Time from first 'doing' event to 'done' event per card. Cards with very long cycle times may indicate tasks that are too large or agents that got stuck.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT kce_done.card_number, kce_done.kanban_session, ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440, 1) AS cycle_minutes, kce_done.agent, kce_done.recorded_at AS completed_at FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' ORDER BY cycle_minutes DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT kce_done.card_number, kce_done.kanban_session, ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440, 1) AS cycle_minutes, kce_done.agent, kce_done.recorded_at AS completed_at FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' ORDER BY cycle_minutes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Lead Time Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of card lead times in hours (start to done). The bulk of the distribution shows typical delivery time; a long tail indicates blocked or complex cards.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 24, 2) AS lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done'
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 24, 2) AS lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done'

panels.title: Average Lead Time by Agent
panels.description: Period-over-prior-period average lead time delta per agent (milliseconds from card start to done). Green delta_pct means faster. Uses event_type = 'start' as the anchor (the correct kanban CLI event).

targets.rawQueryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_period FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.agent), prior AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime((2*$__from - $__to)/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.agent) SELECT c.agent, c.avg_lead_ms_period, COALESCE(p.avg_lead_ms_prior, 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior, CASE WHEN p.avg_lead_ms_prior IS NULL OR p.avg_lead_ms_prior = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((c.avg_lead_ms_period - p.avg_lead_ms_prior) / p.avg_lead_ms_prior) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM cur c LEFT JOIN prior p ON c.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS avg_lead_ms_period, p.avg_lead_ms_prior, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior p LEFT JOIN cur c ON p.agent = c.agent WHERE c.agent IS NULL ORDER BY avg_lead_ms_period DESC
targets.queryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_period FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.agent), prior AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime((2*$__from - $__to)/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.agent) SELECT c.agent, c.avg_lead_ms_period, COALESCE(p.avg_lead_ms_prior, 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior, CASE WHEN p.avg_lead_ms_prior IS NULL OR p.avg_lead_ms_prior = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((c.avg_lead_ms_period - p.avg_lead_ms_prior) / p.avg_lead_ms_prior) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM cur c LEFT JOIN prior p ON c.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS avg_lead_ms_period, p.avg_lead_ms_prior, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior p LEFT JOIN cur c ON p.agent = c.agent WHERE c.agent IS NULL ORDER BY avg_lead_ms_period DESC

panels.title: Weekly Lead Time Trend (median duration)
panels.description: Average lead time per week, in milliseconds displayed as human-readable duration (SQLite has no native MEDIAN; AVG is used as an approximation). Tells you whether throughput is improving or degrading.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH lead_times AS (SELECT kce_done.card_number, strftime('%Y-W%W', kce_done.recorded_at) AS week, MIN(kce_done.recorded_at) AS week_done_at, ((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0) AS lead_ms FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.card_number, week) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(week_done_at, 'weekday 0', '-6 days')) AS time, AVG(lead_ms) AS avg_lead_ms FROM lead_times GROUP BY week ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: WITH lead_times AS (SELECT kce_done.card_number, strftime('%Y-W%W', kce_done.recorded_at) AS week, MIN(kce_done.recorded_at) AS week_done_at, ((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0) AS lead_ms FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.card_number, week) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(week_done_at, 'weekday 0', '-6 days')) AS time, AVG(lead_ms) AS avg_lead_ms FROM lead_times GROUP BY week ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Token Usage Breakdown
panels.description: Input, output, and cache-read token volumes stacked by model family. A small cache-read segment relative to input means context is being invalidated — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY input_tokens DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY input_tokens DESC

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio Over Time
panels.description: Percentage of input tokens served from cache vs. fresh input, per day. Below 70% means context is being invalidated frequently — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens) + SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens) + SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Permission Denials Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of permission denials. Rising denials indicate agents attempting actions outside their allowed scope — check the Permission Denials by Tool panel to identify which tools are being blocked.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(denied_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM permission_denials WHERE denied_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND denied_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', denied_at) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(denied_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM permission_denials WHERE denied_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND denied_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', denied_at) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Permission Denials by Tool
panels.description: Tools that were blocked by the permission system, ranked by denial count. Repeated denials for the same tool indicate an agent is attempting actions it is not authorized for — either the task prompt needs adjustment or the permission configuration needs updating.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS denial_count FROM permission_denials GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denial_count DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS denial_count FROM permission_denials GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denial_count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Tool Usage Heatmap
panels.description: Call frequency per tool, broken down by bash command. High call counts for any single tool indicate heavy usage patterns — cross-reference with Most Denied Tools to see if those same tools are also being blocked.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, bash_command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage GROUP BY tool_name, bash_command ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, bash_command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage GROUP BY tool_name, bash_command ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Agent Run Duration
panels.description: Distribution of agent run durations in minutes (last_seen_at minus first_seen_at). The bulk of the distribution shows typical agent duration; outliers on the right indicate agents working on large or complex tasks.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN duration_minutes < 5 THEN '<5m' WHEN duration_minutes < 15 THEN '5-15m' WHEN duration_minutes < 30 THEN '15-30m' WHEN duration_minutes < 60 THEN '30-60m' WHEN duration_minutes < 120 THEN '1-2h' ELSE '>2h' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT (julianday(last_seen_at) - julianday(first_seen_at)) * 1440 AS duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND last_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND first_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND last_seen_at > first_seen_at) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY MIN(duration_minutes)
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN duration_minutes < 5 THEN '<5m' WHEN duration_minutes < 15 THEN '5-15m' WHEN duration_minutes < 30 THEN '15-30m' WHEN duration_minutes < 60 THEN '30-60m' WHEN duration_minutes < 120 THEN '1-2h' ELSE '>2h' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT (julianday(last_seen_at) - julianday(first_seen_at)) * 1440 AS duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND last_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND first_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND last_seen_at > first_seen_at) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY MIN(duration_minutes)

panels.title: Model Distribution by Agent
panels.description: Cross-reference of agent persona vs model used, with total cost. Opus used for simple tasks is a red flag — check whether the delegation prompt is specifying a model or leaving it to the agent.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT agent, model, COUNT(*) AS runs, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent, model ORDER BY total_cost DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT agent, model, COUNT(*) AS runs, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent, model ORDER BY total_cost DESC

panels.title: Turns Per Agent
panels.description: Period-over-prior-period turn count delta per agent role. turns_period vs turns_prior shows whether an agent is consuming more or fewer API round-trips. Filter by repo using the Repo variable above.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_period FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_prior FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime((2*$__from - $__to)/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT c.agent, c.turns_period, COALESCE(p.turns_prior, 0) AS turns_prior, CASE WHEN p.turns_prior IS NULL OR p.turns_prior = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((CAST(c.turns_period AS REAL) - p.turns_prior) / p.turns_prior) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM cur c LEFT JOIN prior p ON c.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS turns_period, p.turns_prior, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior p LEFT JOIN cur c ON p.agent = c.agent WHERE c.agent IS NULL ORDER BY turns_period DESC
targets.queryText: WITH cur AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_period FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_prior FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime((2*$__from - $__to)/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at < strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT c.agent, c.turns_period, COALESCE(p.turns_prior, 0) AS turns_prior, CASE WHEN p.turns_prior IS NULL OR p.turns_prior = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((CAST(c.turns_period AS REAL) - p.turns_prior) / p.turns_prior) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM cur c LEFT JOIN prior p ON c.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS turns_period, p.turns_prior, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior p LEFT JOIN cur c ON p.agent = c.agent WHERE c.agent IS NULL ORDER BY turns_period DESC

panels.title: Agent Activity Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of agent runs per agent type. A declining trend for a particular agent type may signal that delegation to that specialist is being reduced, intentionally or not.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS agent_runs FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS agent_runs FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Card Flow
panels.description: Recent cards with their events, showing the flow from creation through to completion. Cards with multiple cycles (todo→doing→done more than once) indicate quality issues or under-specified task definitions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT card_number, kanban_session, event_type, agent, model, recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 100
targets.queryText: SELECT card_number, kanban_session, event_type, agent, model, recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Cost per Completed Card
panels.description: Daily cost divided by the number of cards reaching 'done' that day. A falling trend means efficiency improvements are working — less spend per unit of delivered work. Spikes indicate days with high agent cost but few completions.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH daily_cost AS (SELECT date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) AS day, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day), daily_done AS (SELECT date(recorded_at) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT card_number) AS done_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', dc.day) AS time, CASE WHEN dd.done_count > 0 THEN dc.total_cost / dd.done_count ELSE NULL END AS cost_per_card FROM daily_cost dc LEFT JOIN daily_done dd ON dc.day = dd.day ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: WITH daily_cost AS (SELECT date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) AS day, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day), daily_done AS (SELECT date(recorded_at) AS day, COUNT(DISTINCT card_number) AS done_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', dc.day) AS time, CASE WHEN dd.done_count > 0 THEN dc.total_cost / dd.done_count ELSE NULL END AS cost_per_card FROM daily_cost dc LEFT JOIN daily_done dd ON dc.day = dd.day ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: Daily average cache_hit_ratio across all agent sessions. Values above 0.70 (70%) indicate healthy context reuse and lower effective cost. A drop below 0.50 is actionable — check for CLAUDE.md changes that invalidate the cache prefix.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, AVG(cache_hit_ratio) AS cache_hit_rate FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at))) AS time, AVG(cache_hit_ratio) AS cache_hit_rate FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at)) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cost by Model
panels.description: Total spend, token volume, and cost-per-1M-tokens broken out by model. Use this to compare model cost-efficiency: a model with lower cost-per-1M-tokens delivers more work per dollar. Filter the time range to evaluate a specific period.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens) AS total_tokens, CASE WHEN SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens) * 1000000.0, 4) ELSE 0.0 END AS cost_per_1m_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY total_cost DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens) AS total_tokens, CASE WHEN SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) / SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens) * 1000000.0, 4) ELSE 0.0 END AS cost_per_1m_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY total_cost DESC

panels.title: Card Duration Percentiles
panels.description: P50/P75/P90 card completion time measured from 'create' event to 'done' event. Computed via row-number window function (SQLite has no native PERCENTILE aggregate). Filtered to the dashboard time window by done event timestamp. Use to detect whether recent changes lengthened or shortened card cycle times.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH done_events AS (SELECT card_number, card_type, recorded_at AS done_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch'))), card_durations AS (SELECT d.card_number, d.card_type, d.done_at, CAST((julianday(d.done_at) - julianday(MAX(c.recorded_at))) * 1440 AS INTEGER) AS duration_minutes FROM done_events d JOIN kanban_card_events c ON c.card_number = d.card_number AND c.event_type = 'create' AND c.recorded_at < d.done_at GROUP BY d.card_number, d.done_at), valid_durations AS (SELECT duration_minutes FROM card_durations WHERE duration_minutes IS NOT NULL AND duration_minutes > 0), count_total AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM valid_durations), ranked AS (SELECT vd.duration_minutes, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY vd.duration_minutes) AS rn, ct.n FROM valid_durations vd, count_total ct) SELECT MIN(CASE WHEN rn >= CAST(n * 0.50 AS INTEGER) THEN duration_minutes END) AS p50_minutes, MIN(CASE WHEN rn >= CAST(n * 0.75 AS INTEGER) THEN duration_minutes END) AS p75_minutes, MIN(CASE WHEN rn >= CAST(n * 0.90 AS INTEGER) THEN duration_minutes END) AS p90_minutes, n AS total_cards FROM ranked
targets.queryText: WITH done_events AS (SELECT card_number, card_type, recorded_at AS done_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch'))), card_durations AS (SELECT d.card_number, d.card_type, d.done_at, CAST((julianday(d.done_at) - julianday(MAX(c.recorded_at))) * 1440 AS INTEGER) AS duration_minutes FROM done_events d JOIN kanban_card_events c ON c.card_number = d.card_number AND c.event_type = 'create' AND c.recorded_at < d.done_at GROUP BY d.card_number, d.done_at), valid_durations AS (SELECT duration_minutes FROM card_durations WHERE duration_minutes IS NOT NULL AND duration_minutes > 0), count_total AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM valid_durations), ranked AS (SELECT vd.duration_minutes, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY vd.duration_minutes) AS rn, ct.n FROM valid_durations vd, count_total ct) SELECT MIN(CASE WHEN rn >= CAST(n * 0.50 AS INTEGER) THEN duration_minutes END) AS p50_minutes, MIN(CASE WHEN rn >= CAST(n * 0.75 AS INTEGER) THEN duration_minutes END) AS p75_minutes, MIN(CASE WHEN rn >= CAST(n * 0.90 AS INTEGER) THEN duration_minutes END) AS p90_minutes, n AS total_cards FROM ranked

list.name: repo
list.label: Repo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT git_repo FROM agent_metrics WHERE git_repo IS NOT NULL ORDER BY git_repo

list.name: Changes
list.rawQuery: SELECT strftime('%s', recorded_at) * 1000 AS time, message AS text, COALESCE(tags, '') AS tags FROM claudit_annotations WHERE recorded_at >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND recorded_at <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY recorded_at
